flows: homepage -> click impostazioni — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user clicks impostazioni";
homepage -> visualizzazione nuovo luogo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user selects 'visualizzazione nuovo luogo'";
visualizzazione nuovo luogo -> click pathfinder — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user clicks pathfinder";
visualizzazione nuovo luogo -> swipe verso l'alto — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user swipes to the right";

flow 2: homepage -> visualizzazione nuovo luogo (no) -> click pathfinder (si) -> apertura pagina pathfinder
flow 3: homepage -> visualizzazione nuovo luogo (no) -> swipe verso l'alto
the diagram models the user flow through a homepage, allowing the user to either access settings or view a new location.
if the user clicks "impostazioni", they are directed to the settings page.
if the user selects "visualizzazione nuovo luogo", they are directed to the pathfinder page.
if the user swipes to the right, the behavior is not explicitly defined in the diagram.
the diagram shows a decision point for whether to click pathfinder or swipe.
pagina dettagliata -> apertura mappa di sistema — transition="click 'navigate'"; explanation="user clicks 'navigate'";
pagina dettagliata -> apertura sito yelp sul browser — transition="click 'open in browser'"; explanation="user clicks 'open in browser'";
pagina dettagliata -> avvio chiamata al business — transition="click 'call business'"; explanation="user clicks 'call business'";
pagina dettagliata -> ritorno ad homepage — transition="click 'indietro'"; explanation="user clicks 'indietro'";

apertura sito yelp sul browser -> pagina dettagliata — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page";
avvio chiamata al business -> pagina dettagliata — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page";
ritorno ad homepage -> pagina dettagliata — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page";
apertura mappa di sistema -> modifica preferenze — transition="no"; explanation="user does not modify preferences";
apertura sito yelp sul browser -> modifica preferenze — transition="no"; explanation="user does not modify preferences";
avvio chiamata al business -> modifica preferenze — transition="no"; explanation="user does not modify preferences";
ritorno ad homepage -> modifica preferenze — transition="no"; explanation="user does not modify preferences";
modifica preferenze -> apertura mappa di sistema — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page after modifying preferences";
modifica preferenze -> apertura sito yelp sul browser — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page after modifying preferences";
modifica preferenze -> avvio chiamata al business — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page after modifying preferences";
modifica preferenze -> ritorno ad homepage — transition="si"; explanation="user navigates to the page after modifying preferences";
the diagram models the navigation flow of a user through a detailed page.
the user can navigate to a map, open yelp in a browser, initiate a business call, return to the homepage, or modify preferences.
the diagram shows a branching flow based on user clicks, leading to different destinations within the application.
the "indietro" button leads back to the homepage, and subsequent clicks can lead to the map, yelp, or business call.
apertura pagina pathfinder -> click "indietro" — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if 'click 'indietro' is clicked";
apertura pagina pathfinder -> visualizzazione domanda — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if 'click 'indietro' is not clicked";
visualizzazione domanda -> scelta risposta — type=transition; explanation="proceed to select an answer";
visualizzazione domanda -> suggerimento disponibile — type=transition; label="suggerimento disponibile"; explanation="if a suggestion is available";
visualizzazione domanda -> visualizzazione luogo suggerito — type=transition; label="visualizzazione luogo suggerito"; explanation="if a suggestion is not available";
suggerimento disponibile -> ritorno ad homepage — type=transition; label="ritorno ad homepage"; explanation="if suggestion is available";
suggerimento non disponibile -> ritorno ad homepage — type=transition; label="ritorno ad homepage"; explanation="if suggestion is not available";
the diagram represents a state machine that guides the user through a question and potential suggestion.
the flow starts with opening the pathfinder page.
if the user clicks "indietro", the flow returns to the homepage.
if the user doesn't click "indietro", the question is displayed.
if a suggestion is available, it's displayed and the user can return to the homepage.
if no suggestion is available, the user is returned to the homepage.

click 'call business' -> avvio chiamata al business — condition="si"; explanation="if 'call business' is clicked";
